name: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts
description: The product does not implement sufficient measures to prevent multiple failed authentication attempts in a short timeframe, allowing attackers to use brute force to guess valid credentials without throttling, lockout, or delay.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node submits repeated authentication attempts to an AUTH node that lacks a CONTROL node enforcing rate limiting, account lockout, progressive delays, or CAPTCHA challenges on failed attempts
